title: New Video and Big Announcement!
excerpt: New video up on my YouTube channel and oh my goodness, over the weekend I hit over 1,000,000 views. Wow! You can read a little more about the announcement on Instagram if you don't want to listen to an entire…
body: New video up on my YouTube channel and oh my goodness, over the weekend I hit over 1,000,000 views. Wow! You can read a little more about the announcement on Instagram if you don't want to listen to an entire video. Also I am planning on finally doing a shop update tomorrow around noon PST to celebrate!
